title: Creating an IT Service Catalogue
scenario: Develop an IT service catalogue for a large retail organization with multiple stores and e-commerce platforms. The catalogue must include IT services, processes, and policies for service management. The output should be a comprehensive document in Excel format.
constraints: Must use a clear and consistent formatting style throughout the document
Must include a detailed table with service level agreements

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the catalogue have a clear logical structure and organization?
Does the catalogue adhere to the specified constraints?
Does the catalogue include IT service management best practices and standards?
Is the tone professional, concise, and free of errors?
